inquiries.query:
/*
Question:In the job_postings_fact table count the number of job postings available for each country. 
Use the job_country column to group the job postings, and count the number of job postings (job_id) within each country group.
*/
SELECT 
	job_country,
    COUNT(job_id) AS job_postings_count
FROM 
	job_postings_fact
GROUP BY
	job_country
ORDER BY 
	job_postings_count DESC
inquiries.name: 24_02_26_prblm5
